valueText: Australia oldest surviving stone arch bridge (1836). Heritage significance - restricted load class applies.
Convict-built sandstone arch. Listed on NSW Heritage Register. Annual inspection required.
Timber suspension bridge converted to pedestrian use. Inspect deck planking and wire ropes biannually.
Swingbridge in Sydney Darling Harbour precinct. Heritage listed. Monitor swing mechanism and pontoon footings.
Sydney Harbour Bridge - national icon. Continuous maintenance program. Monitor hanger rods and arch rib fatigue annually.
